analysis.summary: The technician performed a manual update of Microsoft Office 365 by directly launching the OfficeClickToRun.exe executable. After the update completed, the technician opened Microsoft Outlook twice to verify its functionality and confirm the successful application of the updates.
actions_taken: Navigated to the Office 365 Click-to-Run executable directory via File Explorer.
Launched 'OfficeClickToRun.exe' to initiate a manual Office 365 update.
Launched Microsoft Outlook to verify functionality post-update.
Opened and reviewed a 'Test Email' within Outlook.
Launched Microsoft Outlook a second time for a quick functionality check.
issues_resolved: Ensured Microsoft Office 365 was updated to the latest version.
Confirmed Microsoft Outlook was functioning correctly after the update.
notable_events: The technician chose to directly execute 'OfficeClickToRun.exe' for the update instead of using the update option within an Office application, which is a less common but effective method.

tech_performance.efficiency_notes: The technician worked methodically and efficiently, directly performing the necessary update and verification steps without hesitation.
